free_text: Exploring breakup coupling effect in 7Li + 92,100Mo
elastic scattering around coulomb barrier energies
Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of
Technology, Surat
Homi Bhabha National Institute,
Anushaktinagar, Mumbai
15 UD Pelletron accelerator
Seven solid state silicon surface
barrier detectors. The thickness of detectors were
T1 with dE = 40 um and E = 2 mm,
T2 with dE = 40 um and E = 1 mm,
T3, T4, T5 with dE = 25 um and E = 1 mm,
were mounted inside 1.5 m diameter scattering chamber
of rotatable arm, each of 6 degree apart.
T6, T7 with dE = 25 um and E = 300 um were fixed
from at 156 and 168 degrees.
A monitor detector of thickness 300 um.
Two surface barrier detectors mounted at
+/- 10 degree for beam monitoring and absolute
normalization.
The estimated statistical uncertainties in
the data ranged from (0.5% to 6 %), except at high
energy and back angles, where errors were up to ~ 15%.
Request sent to C.Joshi from G.Mohanto (2022-09-05)
VT+LV+On.
of thickness 217 ug/cm2.

and a maximum of ~70 keV at 15 MeV.
